_comment:
Editorial picks for the top of pubs/index.html. Read by scripts/generate-pubs-index.mjs. Two tiers:
  * stable[]         — ALWAYS visible, in this order, at positions 1-N. The page's flagship trio — what you most want a first-time visitor to see no matter when they land. Keep this small (3 is good).
  * rotation_pool[]  — A curated set of editor's-pick venues. The script picks 3 daily, deterministically seeded by the date, and shows them immediately after the stable trio. The same 3 show all day; tomorrow you'll see a different 3. Grow this list freely — bigger pool = more rotation. 15-20 entries is the sweet spot.
Positions after stable+rotation are auto-filled from Supabase by shuffling the 40 most-recently-updated venues with full data (see fetchRecentVenues() in the script).
The JSON-LD ItemList on the same page is regenerated from the top 6 visible venues (stable + daily-rotated) so what humans see and what Google sees stay in sync.
To add or replace a venue, edit this file and either run scripts/generate-pubs-index.mjs locally or wait for the nightly 03:17 UTC cron.
